requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic compatibility for refrigerating appliances (EN/IEC-based test scope)
requirement_topic.zh: 家用制冷器具的电磁兼容要求（基于IEC系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 家用製冷器具的電磁相容要求（基於IEC系列）

summary.en: Where a Peru Reglamento Tecnico references EMC for refrigeration or power-electronic appliances, imported models should provide evidence aligned with Peru-adopted NTP test expectations for emissions and immunity, including inverter or variable-speed compressor variants. If a model includes frequency-conversion electronics, test scope and setup should be reviewed to ensure Peru-relevant conditions are covered.
summary.zh: 若秘鲁技术规章对家用冰箱或含电力电子的制冷器具引用EMC要求，进口型号应提供与秘鲁采用的NTP测试预期一致的辐射发射和抗扰度证据，包括变频压缩机或逆变供电方案。若型号包含频率转换电子模块，需核实测试范围和测试工况是否覆盖秘鲁认可条件。
summary.zht: 若秘魯技術規章對家用冰箱或含電力電子的製冷器具引用EMC要求，進口型號應提供與秘魯採納的NTP測試預期一致的輻射發射和抗擾度證據，包括變頻壓縮機或逆變供電方案。若型號包含頻率轉換電子模組，需核實測試範圍和測試工況是否覆蓋秘魯認可條件。

standards_or_laws: INACAL-adopted NTP clauses for electromagnetic compatibility applicable to relevant refrigerator configurations
INACAL / PRODUCE technical regulation framework where EMC is included in scope
Peru import documentation requirements for technical test evidence

summary.en: China applies mandatory safety-EMC frameworks including GB 4343.1 and related test documents for domestic market sale under CCC. Many models are tested by GB/T or industry methods, but the report set is prepared for Chinese market conditions and accepted by Chinese authorities, not automatically by Peru import clearance.
summary.zh: 中国在国内销售阶段按CCC执行包括GB 4343.1在内的安全电磁框架。许多型号使用GB/T或行业方法测得的EMC数据，但该报告集是按中国市场条件出具并用于中国监管认可，不能自动被秘鲁通关直接采纳。
summary.zht: 中國在國內銷售階段按CCC執行包括GB 4343.1在內的安全電磁框架。許多型號使用GB/T或行業方法測得的EMC數據，但該報告集是按中國市場條件出具並用於中國監管認可，不能自動被秘魯通關直接採納。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Emission limits and measurement methods for household appliances
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Immunity principles for household appliances
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) process for required classes

gap.en: The gap is typically documentation acceptance and technical scope. Chinese EMC reports must be assessed for Peru applicability and reissued or supplemented where Peru requires additional conditions, especially for inverter-based compressor designs.
gap.zh: 差距主要在于文件可接受性与技术范围。中国EMC报告须按秘鲁要求评估适用性，并在秘鲁要求额外条件（尤其是含逆变压缩机）的情况下进行复核、补充或重测。
gap.zht: 差距主要在於文件可接受性與技術範圍。中國EMC報告須按秘魯要求評估適用性，並在秘魯要求額外條件（尤其是含逆變壓縮機）的情況下進行複核、補充或重測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where PERU technical scope for EMI/EMC applies to the imported appliance category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under CCC safety-EMC regime for domestic market placement in applicable classes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC evidence from China can be leveraged only after Peru scope mapping. For inverter-based refrigerators, confirm emission and immunity conditions against the Peru-applied NTP and include supplement tests where required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国EMC证据仅能在完成秘鲁适用范围映射后使用。对逆变式冰箱，应确认发射与抗扰度条件是否符合秘鲁适用NTP，并在需要时补充测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國EMC證據僅能在完成秘魯適用範圍映射後使用。對逆變式冰箱，應確認發射與抗擾度條件是否符合秘魯適用NTP，並在需要時補充測試。

requirement_topic.en: MTC homologación for refrigerators with radio control or connectivity modules
requirement_topic.zh: 含无线控制或联网模块冰箱的MTC核准
requirement_topic.zht: 含無線控制或聯網模組冰箱的MTC核准

summary.en: If a refrigerator includes Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other radio modules for smart-control features, the radio subsystem must satisfy Peruvian telecommunications compliance expectations and obtain MTC homologación. This includes model-level radio approval and technical data supporting permitted frequency and power behavior.
summary.zh: 若冰箱具备Wi-Fi、蓝牙或其他无线模块用于智能控制，该无线子系统需满足秘鲁电信合规要求并取得MTC核准。通常包括型号级别批准及无线频段和功率参数资料。
summary.zht: 若冰箱具備Wi-Fi、藍牙或其他無線模組用於智慧控制，該無線子系統需符合秘魯電信合規要求並取得MTC核准。通常包括型號級別批准及無線頻段和功率參數資料。

standards_or_laws: MTC homologación requirements for radio/electronic products imported into Peru
INDECOPI product conformity process when the product class is linked to a Reglamento Tecnico
Peru import clearance checklist for communication-enabled appliances

summary.en: China requires radio module approvals under domestic telecom and product systems (for example SRRC-related requirements) when exporting or selling communication features in China. This is separate from Peru MTC homologación and does not create automatic reciprocal recognition.
summary.zh: 中国对通信模块产品在国内销售时有对应电信或产品审批（如SRRC相关要求）义务，但与秘鲁MTC核准分属体系，不能自动互认。
summary.zht: 中國對通信模組產品在中國國內銷售時有對應電信或產品審批（如SRRC相關要求）義務，但與秘魯MTC核准屬不同體系，不能自動互認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC domestic telecom acceptance framework in China
CCC safety/EMC pathway where module is within covered appliance class

gap.en: In Peru, an MTC step is required for connectivity-enabled refrigerators, while pure mechanical or non-radio units are not in this pathway. If a model has wireless features, test and filing scope must be separated from general electrical safety evidence and managed by the importer.
gap.zh: 在秘鲁，具备连接功能的冰箱须走MTC途径，无线功能与否影响要求；非无线版本通常不触发该项。若有无线功能，须将无线适配测试与一般电气安全材料分开管理并由进口商推进。
gap.zht: 在秘魯，具備連接功能的冰箱須走MTC途徑，無線功能與否影響要求；非無線版本通常不觸發該項。若有無線功能，須將無線適配測試與一般電氣安全材料分開管理並由進口商推進。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for models with radio communication modules; not mandatory for non-radio refrigerators
mandatory_status.cn: Model-dependent in China; module-specific approvals may be required domestically but are not equivalent to Peru MTC homologación

source.publisher: Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones (MTC), PRODUCE, and INACAL

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The safe route is: if any wireless module is present, secure Peru MTC homologación separately from the general safety/energy package. China module filings are not by themselves sufficient for Peru clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安全做法是：凡含无线模块的型号，应将秘鲁MTC核准与一般安全/能效文件分开完成。中国的模块核准本身不足以代替秘鲁放行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安全做法是：凡含無線模組的型號，應將秘魯MTC核准與一般安全/能效文件分開完成。中國的模組核准本身不足以代替秘魯放行。
